name: NotebookLM Query Connection Failure RCA
confirmed_findings: Authentication and target notebook access are valid.
A source-grounded query succeeds at the time of assessment.
The reported errors are interrupted response-stream failures.
The approved 0.8.6 upgrade passed default-transport authentication, listing, doctor, and grounded-query checks.
A missing persisted session ID reproduced the one-source query disconnect and was repaired by nlm login --force.
blockers: Any transport change requires user approval.
No upstream request ID or server-side telemetry is available to assign exclusive responsibility to Google.
